name: WhatsInMyPackage
description: check/look at services i have in my package, discuss existing package.

sampleUtterances.utterance: What is included in my current Virgin Media package?
Tell me exactly what my {productTypePackage} and {productTypePackage2} deal comprises.
Show me a comprehensive list of everything in my plan.
I want a breakdown of my current services and add-ons.
Explain what services I am currently paying for.
What are the specific features and benefits of my account?
What is the actual download and upload speed I should be getting?
Which {productTypePackage} are part of my subscription?
Is {productTypePackage} or {productTypePackage2} included in my package?
What equipment and hardware come with my current setup?
Do I get a SIM card or mobile data with my plan?
Tell me the data allowance for my {productTypePackage} service.
I want to see the individual costs for each service in my bundle.
Show me the current monthly price for my Virgin services.

Review my account package.
